name: Cracked Sash
description: Cracked Sash is an Epic-grade Tediore shield in Borderlands 2. It sacrifices capacity for rapid recovery, featuring a very high recharge rate and an exceptionally short recharge delay (about 0.98 to 1.48 seconds). This makes it well suited to quickly getting your shield back up during fast, aggressive fights. It has no exclusive effect beyond its stat profile. Similar purple Tediore shields with matching parts can reach comparable results, and its restricted part pool can also limit access to some elemental resistance capacitors.

special.description: Very low capacity, but an exceptionally short recharge delay and fast recharge rate.

notes: Despite being treated as a unique item, its performance is essentially replicable by standard purple Tediore shields, which are usually easier to obtain in normal play.
